visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man's face in a dimly lit, dark environment. He has short, dark hair and a concerned expression. He holds a phone to his ear with his right hand, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio begins with a man speaking into a phone in a calm, questioning tone, saying, "喂?" (Hello?). His voice is then cut off by another man shouting urgently and aggressively, "把货扔海里，快点!" (Throw the goods in the sea, quick!). The camera cuts to a wide shot of a dark, wet outdoor area at night. A bright, warm light from a streetlamp illuminates the foreground, creating a lens flare. In the background, the blurry lights of a city or town are visible across a body of water. A chain-link fence runs along the right side of the frame. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. A loud, sharp, and impactful sound, like a gunshot or a powerful thud, rings out, creating a moment of intense action. The scene shifts to a medium shot of two men standing close together at night. The man in the foreground
